TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Uuy411110, title = Uuy411110, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Uuy411110} }

S.FORM: misulit pabi tu nayay ku punu` a tatayna, tukamu micidek. tatayna, hadaadauc amana` pabin cima tu nikaudip, anuyaan anu miliyas, naynayi tu ku cacanan ! tatayna, hadaadauc amana` palutatenga tu kamu nu tatama, umahidaay mahida u misalamaay, tudemiay , caykatinengi ! tatayna, amana` pitengil tu nipiawaw"paw-pay" atu "cin-ayte" tanunamuh sa, kapahcinida miawaw tisuwa, amahida kuni piawawnuda tu taw ! tatayna, amana`patadu tu kamu caypiduka` ss tisuwa, anu caykaw nipaetengan , anu mahida cinida caytu kawnu tademawa! tatayna, uaalesen a tademaw , saicelang han musakamu hidaw haw han, amana` kaayahuya, katinengantu caay papilihica tisuwan ,sayca misawacu tu udip. tatayna, anu caay papilihica tu balucu` sa, kanahatu maydihenay , saycantu piliyasitu, cima kumaydihay muduka tu sakaydihan a tatayna nu udip. tatayna, amana`padang sa, anu caytu kadakep padang han, saycan tu misakadih tu udip. tatayna, anu tatenga miales, saheci han amiliyas, amana kaayahuya pacukas aca, anu mahida sa hidahan tu nu taw casatu papilihicai! tatayna, amana`kasaetim mukan sidikuc tu kapahay, kasaetim tu udip nu udip, widatu acacay. tatayna, , katineng tu udip, katineng tu ngelu isu, tu caypilikay nu lumaay tu cacan akawaw, nayay ku mikutayay tisuwan. Itamalekakay a tatayna naming, sakapah han maudip, inayay ku musaetimay titaan, palutatenga kisu tinakamu haw ? paadihen ku cabay may! ŚßźŚ¶ĻŚÄĎ, nikaudip idaw aca ku caykatatudung, payawaw ,alahican sumaden ku balucu`, udip tu kumudatengay, akay patelac kunidateng, akay uduma kulaecus, akay mamahicay kiya, akay u kapahy tu, anu mahida sa akay masumad ku dateng, yumahida ku nidateng, akay usasuayaw a kawaw payawan. palasiten kinasulit !ŤąášĹ†ŚąÜšļęÔľĀ namaydih tu,masiyaw tu, adada tu, muwangic tu, mabidang tu, macunus tu, malines tu, mangelu` tu, mangleb tu mabiyalaw tu nayay ku wantan tu, nikaudipan mahini. u mata cebal kemet sa cacay a demiad yada tu uliwliw nu mata kemet cebal sa nikaudipan yadatu . yu cayhenay kabalaki yu maudip henay kita , kasaetim tu maadihay a cacanan. , kasaetim tu, lalumaan, cabay, ukaydihan, . Inamahiniay kinacacay, duma anikaydih malakuwit mana pihalhal ! u maudipay , masasetset maydih tu ngangan, atu epuc. . cay kasidikuc malatademaw, mapatay sa naynayi balisa, walesay sa tayni, walesay sa yadatu. , Manapisapudah tu udip, mana pisayadah, kiya ngaliwngiw. . manapisukaynah, manapisaebet tu udip, lipahak ku kapahay widasa mahini dawmi ku maudipay.ŚÖ∂ŚĮ¶šļļÁĒüŚįĪťÄôťļľÁį°ŚĖģ. ucanan ku kakitaan hananay, ucana masasukaydih masasuada. , mahida u wacah malawpes, sanayi tu.ťÉĹÁĀįť£õÁÖôśĽÖ,šłÄÁ≠ÜŚčĺťä∑. sadihemay han tu dedemiadśąĎŚÄĎŤ¶ĀŚĖĄŚĺÖśĮŹšłÄŚ§©, Kasaetim tu ddemiad, sakapah han tu demiad. . hidan u haynikabalaki ku cacay ademiad, seitan tu kisu. .maudip, amana` katadikud. śīĽŤĎó,Śą•ÁłĹŚéĽŚĺĆśāĒ.Mukan mukan tu , manaka dangidi tu laway Maydih maydih tu mana katadikud. malaliyas ku malaliyas tu, mana palulaecus. . Cileminay sicedamay mangeluay aledahay, winikiya tatengaay nu tademaw. namaydih tu, namaungaeng tu adadatu muwangic tu mahica tawa han. malibu tu mabidang tu mabusuk tu malinges tu payawa paydang han tu. Patay nu ngelu`, mangelu`, malalum, mahicaykiya, masabuhat hank u balucu` pacebahan maudip. . saekengen, misanamuh, misaetim, manamuh, mahini kiya namaudip. maudip ku tademaw "inayay ku kapahay" anu mabidang sa, datenge ku tuluay a kamu alahican, maydih misatabaki a muwangic, yu adada ku balucu`, alahica caay katatudung ku kawaw. alahican , tatenga mayih muungal a muwangic, adada kiyami ku balucu' u kawaw atu kaydihan casy kadaduala. u masadepay a nikaudip nu mademec nu masumaday a labunu luma`, misungay patahekal tu balucu` pasayda tu cacay atademaw adihsakutaw u kasinil ku piadih. .
S.PHON: misur~…ĺit pabi tu najaj ku punu` a tatajna, tukamu mi ¶id…ôk. tatajna, ńßadaadau ¶ amana` pabin ¶ima tu nikaudip, anujaan anu mir~…ĺijas, najnaji tu ku ¶a ¶anan ! tatajna, ńßadaadau ¶ amana` par~…ĺutat…ôŇča tu kamu nu tatama, umańßidaaj mańßida u misar~…ĺamaaj, tud…ômiaj , ¶ajkatin…ôŇči ! tatajna, amana` pit…ôŇčir~…ĺ tu nipiawaw"paw-paj" atu " ¶in-ajt…ô" tanunamuńß sa, kapańß ¶inida miawaw tisuwa, amańßida kuni piawawnuda tu taw ! tatajna, amana`patadu tu kamu ¶ajpiduka` ss tisuwa, anu ¶ajkaw nipa…ôt…ôŇčan , anu mańßida ¶inida ¶ajtu kawnu tad…ômawa! tatajna, uaar~…ĺ…ôs…ôn a tad…ômaw , sai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč ńßan musakamu ńßidaw ńßaw ńßan, amana` kaajańßuja, katin…ôŇčantu ¶aaj papir~…ĺińßi ¶a tisuwan ,saj ¶a misawa ¶u tu udip. tatajna, anu ¶aaj papir~…ĺińßi ¶a tu bar~…ĺu ¶u` sa, kanańßatu majdińß…ônaj , saj ¶antu pir~…ĺijasitu, ¶ima kumajdińßaj muduka tu sakajdińßan a tatajna nu udip. tatajna, amana`padaŇč sa, anu ¶ajtu kadak…ôp padaŇč ńßan, saj ¶an tu misakadińß tu udip. tatajna, anu tat…ôŇča miar~…ĺ…ôs, sańß…ô ¶i ńßan amir~…ĺijas, amana kaajańßuja pa ¶ukas a ¶a, anu mańßida sa ńßidańßan tu nu taw ¶asatu papir~…ĺińßi ¶ai! tatajna, amana`kasa…ôtim mukan sidiku ¶ tu kapańßaj, kasa…ôtim tu udip nu udip, widatu a ¶a ¶aj. tatajna, , katin…ôŇč tu udip, katin…ôŇč tu Ňč…ôr~…ĺu isu, tu ¶ajpir~…ĺikaj nu r~…ĺumaaj tu ¶a ¶an akawaw, najaj ku mikutajaj tisuwan. itamar~…ĺ…ôkakaj a tatajna namiŇč, sakapańß ńßan maudip, inajaj ku musa…ôtimaj titaan, par~…ĺutat…ôŇča kisu tinakamu ńßaw ? paadińß…ôn ku ¶abaj maj! ***, nikaudip idaw a ¶a ku ¶ajkatatuduŇč, pajawaw ,ar~…ĺańßi ¶an sumad…ôn ku bar~…ĺu ¶u`, udip tu kumudat…ôŇčaj, akaj pat…ôr~…ĺa ¶ kunidat…ôŇč, akaj uduma kur~…ĺa…ô ¶us, akaj mamańßi ¶aj kija, akaj u kapańßj tu, anu mańßida sa akaj masumad ku dat…ôŇč, jumańßida ku nidat…ôŇč, akaj usasuajaw a kawaw pajawan. par~…ĺasit…ôn kinasur~…ĺit !***** namajdińß tu,masijaw tu, adada tu, muwaŇči ¶ tu, mabidaŇč tu, ma ¶unus tu, mar~…ĺin…ôs tu, maŇč…ôr~…ĺu` tu, maŇčr~…ĺ…ôb tu mabijar~…ĺaw tu najaj ku wantan tu, nikaudipan mańßini. u mata ¶…ôbar~…ĺ k…ôm…ôt sa ¶a ¶aj a d…ômiad jada tu ur~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw nu mata k…ôm…ôt ¶…ôbar~…ĺ sa nikaudipan jadatu . ju ¶ajńß…ônaj kabar~…ĺaki ju maudip ńß…ônaj kita , kasa…ôtim tu maadińßaj a ¶a ¶anan. , kasa…ôtim tu, r~…ĺar~…ĺumaan, ¶abaj, ukajdińßan, . inamańßiniaj kina ¶a ¶aj, duma anikajdińß mar~…ĺakuwit mana pińßar~…ĺńßar~…ĺ ! u maudipaj , masas…ôts…ôt majdińß tu ŇčaŇčan, atu …ôpu ¶. . ¶aj kasidiku ¶ mar~…ĺatad…ômaw, mapataj sa najnaji bar~…ĺisa, war~…ĺ…ôsaj sa tajni, war~…ĺ…ôsaj sa jadatu. , manapisapudańß tu udip, mana pisajadańß, kija Ňčar~…ĺiwŇčiw. . manapisukajnańß, manapisa…ôb…ôt tu udip, r~…ĺipańßak ku kapańßaj widasa mańßini dawmi ku maudipaj.*********. u ¶anan ku kakitaan ńßananaj, u ¶ana masasukajdińß masasuada. , mańßida u wa ¶ańß mar~…ĺawp…ôs, sanaji tu.*****,****. sadińß…ômaj ńßan tu d…ôd…ômiad********, kasa…ôtim tu dd…ômiad, sakapańß ńßan tu d…ômiad. . ńßidan u ńßajnikabar~…ĺaki ku ¶a ¶aj ad…ômiad, s…ôitan tu kisu. .maudip, amana` katadikud. **,*****.mukan mukan tu , manaka daŇčidi tu r~…ĺawaj majdińß majdińß tu mana katadikud. mar~…ĺar~…ĺijas ku mar~…ĺar~…ĺijas tu, mana par~…ĺur~…ĺa…ô ¶us. . ¶ir~…ĺ…ôminaj si ¶…ôdamaj maŇč…ôr~…ĺuaj ar~…ĺ…ôdańßaj, winikija tat…ôŇčaaj nu tad…ômaw. namajdińß tu, namauŇča…ôŇč tu adadatu muwaŇči ¶ tu mańßi ¶a tawa ńßan. mar~…ĺibu tu mabidaŇč tu mabusuk tu mar~…ĺiŇč…ôs tu pajawa pajdaŇč ńßan tu. pataj nu Ňč…ôr~…ĺu`, maŇč…ôr~…ĺu`, mar~…ĺar~…ĺum, mańßi ¶ajkija, masabuńßat ńßank u bar~…ĺu ¶u` pa ¶…ôbańßan maudip. . sa…ôk…ôŇč…ôn, misanamuńß, misa…ôtim, manamuńß, mańßini kija namaudip. maudip ku tad…ômaw "inajaj ku kapańßaj" anu mabidaŇč sa, dat…ôŇč…ô ku tur~…ĺuaj a kamu ar~…ĺańßi ¶an, majdińß misatabaki a muwaŇči ¶, ju adada ku bar~…ĺu ¶u`, ar~…ĺańßi ¶a ¶aaj katatuduŇč ku kawaw. ar~…ĺańßi ¶an , tat…ôŇča majińß muuŇčar~…ĺ a muwaŇči ¶, adada kijami ku bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° u kawaw atu kajdińßan ¶asj kadaduar~…ĺa. u masad…ôpaj a nikaudip nu mad…ôm…ô ¶ nu masumadaj a r~…ĺabunu r~…ĺuma`, misuŇčaj patańß…ôkar~…ĺ tu bar~…ĺu ¶u` pasajda tu ¶a ¶aj atad…ômaw adińßsakutaw u kasinir~…ĺ ku piadińß. .
S.FORM: misulit pabi tu nayay ku punu` a tatayna, tukamu micidek. tatayna, hadaadauc amana` pabin cima tu nikaudip, anuyaan anu miliyas, naynayi tu ku cacanan ! tatayna, hadaadauc amana` palutatenga tu kamu nu tatama, umahidaay mahida u misalamaay, tudemiay , caykatinengi ! tatayna, amana` pitengil tu nipiawaw"paw-pay" atu "cin-ayte" tanunamuh sa, kapahcinida miawaw tisuwa, amahida kuni piawawnuda tu taw ! tatayna, amana`patadu tu kamu caypiduka` ss tisuwa, anu caykaw nipaetengan , anu mahida cinida caytu kawnu tademawa! tatayna, uaalesen a tademaw , saicelang han musakamu hidaw haw han, amana` kaayahuya, katinengantu caay papilihica tisuwan ,sayca misawacu tu udip. tatayna, anu caay papilihica tu balucu` sa, kanahatu maydihenay , saycantu piliyasitu, cima kumaydihay muduka tu sakaydihan a tatayna nu udip. tatayna, amana`padang sa, anu caytu kadakep padang han, saycan tu misakadih tu udip. tatayna, anu tatenga miales, saheci han amiliyas, amana kaayahuya pacukas aca, anu mahida sa hidahan tu nu taw casatu papilihicai! tatayna, amana`kasaetim mukan sidikuc tu kapahay, kasaetim tu udip nu udip, widatu acacay. tatayna, , katineng tu udip, katineng tu ngelu isu, tu caypilikay nu lumaay tu cacan akawaw, nayay ku mikutayay tisuwan. Itamalekakay a tatayna naming, sakapah han maudip, inayay ku musaetimay titaan, palutatenga kisu tinakamu haw ? paadihen ku cabay may! ŚßźŚ¶ĻŚÄĎ, nikaudip idaw aca ku caykatatudung, payawaw ,alahican sumaden ku balucu`, udip tu kumudatengay, akay patelac kunidateng, akay uduma kulaecus, akay mamahicay kiya, akay u kapahy tu, anu mahida sa akay masumad ku dateng, yumahida ku nidateng, akay usasuayaw a kawaw payawan. palasiten kinasulit !ŤąášĹ†ŚąÜšļęÔľĀ namaydih tu,masiyaw tu, adada tu, muwangic tu, mabidang tu, macunus tu, malines tu, mangelu` tu, mangleb tu mabiyalaw tu nayay ku wantan tu, nikaudipan mahini. u mata cebal kemet sa cacay a demiad yada tu uliwliw nu mata kemet cebal sa nikaudipan yadatu . yu cayhenay kabalaki yu maudip henay kita , kasaetim tu maadihay a cacanan. , kasaetim tu, lalumaan, cabay, ukaydihan, . Inamahiniay kinacacay, duma anikaydih malakuwit mana pihalhal ! u maudipay , masasetset maydih tu ngangan, atu epuc. . cay kasidikuc malatademaw, mapatay sa naynayi balisa, walesay sa tayni, walesay sa yadatu. , Manapisapudah tu udip, mana pisayadah, kiya ngaliwngiw. . manapisukaynah, manapisaebet tu udip, lipahak ku kapahay widasa mahini dawmi ku maudipay.ŚÖ∂ŚĮ¶šļļÁĒüŚįĪťÄôťļľÁį°ŚĖģ. ucanan ku kakitaan hananay, ucana masasukaydih masasuada. , mahida u wacah malawpes, sanayi tu.ťÉĹÁĀįť£õÁÖôśĽÖ,šłÄÁ≠ÜŚčĺťä∑. sadihemay han tu dedemiadśąĎŚÄĎŤ¶ĀŚĖĄŚĺÖśĮŹšłÄŚ§©, Kasaetim tu ddemiad, sakapah han tu demiad. . hidan u haynikabalaki ku cacay ademiad, seitan tu kisu. .maudip, amana` katadikud. śīĽŤĎó,Śą•ÁłĹŚéĽŚĺĆśāĒ.Mukan mukan tu , manaka dangidi tu laway Maydih maydih tu mana katadikud. malaliyas ku malaliyas tu, mana palulaecus. . Cileminay sicedamay mangeluay aledahay, winikiya tatengaay nu tademaw. namaydih tu, namaungaeng tu adadatu muwangic tu mahica tawa han. malibu tu mabidang tu mabusuk tu malinges tu payawa paydang han tu. Patay nu ngelu`, mangelu`, malalum, mahicaykiya, masabuhat hank u balucu` pacebahan maudip. . saekengen, misanamuh, misaetim, manamuh, mahini kiya namaudip. maudip ku tademaw "inayay ku kapahay" anu mabidang sa, datenge ku tuluay a kamu alahican, maydih misatabaki a muwangic, yu adada ku balucu`, alahica caay katatudung ku kawaw. alahican , tatenga mayih muungal a muwangic, adada kiyami ku balucu' u kawaw atu kaydihan casy kadaduala. u masadepay a nikaudip nu mademec nu masumaday a labunu luma`, misungay patahekal tu balucu` pasayda tu cacay atademaw adihsakutaw u kasinil ku piadih. .
S.PHON: misur~…ĺit pabi tu najaj ku punu` a tatajna, tukamu mi ¶id…ôk. tatajna, ńßadaadau ¶ amana` pabin ¶ima tu nikaudip, anujaan anu mir~…ĺijas, najnaji tu ku ¶a ¶anan ! tatajna, ńßadaadau ¶ amana` par~…ĺutat…ôŇča tu kamu nu tatama, umańßidaaj mańßida u misar~…ĺamaaj, tud…ômiaj , ¶ajkatin…ôŇči ! tatajna, amana` pit…ôŇčir~…ĺ tu nipiawaw"paw-paj" atu " ¶in-ajt…ô" tanunamuńß sa, kapańß ¶inida miawaw tisuwa, amańßida kuni piawawnuda tu taw ! tatajna, amana`patadu tu kamu ¶ajpiduka` ss tisuwa, anu ¶ajkaw nipa…ôt…ôŇčan , anu mańßida ¶inida ¶ajtu kawnu tad…ômawa! tatajna, uaar~…ĺ…ôs…ôn a tad…ômaw , sai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč ńßan musakamu ńßidaw ńßaw ńßan, amana` kaajańßuja, katin…ôŇčantu ¶aaj papir~…ĺińßi ¶a tisuwan ,saj ¶a misawa ¶u tu udip. tatajna, anu ¶aaj papir~…ĺińßi ¶a tu bar~…ĺu ¶u` sa, kanańßatu majdińß…ônaj , saj ¶antu pir~…ĺijasitu, ¶ima kumajdińßaj muduka tu sakajdińßan a tatajna nu udip. tatajna, amana`padaŇč sa, anu ¶ajtu kadak…ôp padaŇč ńßan, saj ¶an tu misakadińß tu udip. tatajna, anu tat…ôŇča miar~…ĺ…ôs, sańß…ô ¶i ńßan amir~…ĺijas, amana kaajańßuja pa ¶ukas a ¶a, anu mańßida sa ńßidańßan tu nu taw ¶asatu papir~…ĺińßi ¶ai! tatajna, amana`kasa…ôtim mukan sidiku ¶ tu kapańßaj, kasa…ôtim tu udip nu udip, widatu a ¶a ¶aj. tatajna, , katin…ôŇč tu udip, katin…ôŇč tu Ňč…ôr~…ĺu isu, tu ¶ajpir~…ĺikaj nu r~…ĺumaaj tu ¶a ¶an akawaw, najaj ku mikutajaj tisuwan. itamar~…ĺ…ôkakaj a tatajna namiŇč, sakapańß ńßan maudip, inajaj ku musa…ôtimaj titaan, par~…ĺutat…ôŇča kisu tinakamu ńßaw ? paadińß…ôn ku ¶abaj maj! ***, nikaudip idaw a ¶a ku ¶ajkatatuduŇč, pajawaw ,ar~…ĺańßi ¶an sumad…ôn ku bar~…ĺu ¶u`, udip tu kumudat…ôŇčaj, akaj pat…ôr~…ĺa ¶ kunidat…ôŇč, akaj uduma kur~…ĺa…ô ¶us, akaj mamańßi ¶aj kija, akaj u kapańßj tu, anu mańßida sa akaj masumad ku dat…ôŇč, jumańßida ku nidat…ôŇč, akaj usasuajaw a kawaw pajawan. par~…ĺasit…ôn kinasur~…ĺit !***** namajdińß tu,masijaw tu, adada tu, muwaŇči ¶ tu, mabidaŇč tu, ma ¶unus tu, mar~…ĺin…ôs tu, maŇč…ôr~…ĺu` tu, maŇčr~…ĺ…ôb tu mabijar~…ĺaw tu najaj ku wantan tu, nikaudipan mańßini. u mata ¶…ôbar~…ĺ k…ôm…ôt sa ¶a ¶aj a d…ômiad jada tu ur~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw nu mata k…ôm…ôt ¶…ôbar~…ĺ sa nikaudipan jadatu . ju ¶ajńß…ônaj kabar~…ĺaki ju maudip ńß…ônaj kita , kasa…ôtim tu maadińßaj a ¶a ¶anan. , kasa…ôtim tu, r~…ĺar~…ĺumaan, ¶abaj, ukajdińßan, . inamańßiniaj kina ¶a ¶aj, duma anikajdińß mar~…ĺakuwit mana pińßar~…ĺńßar~…ĺ ! u maudipaj , masas…ôts…ôt majdińß tu ŇčaŇčan, atu …ôpu ¶. . ¶aj kasidiku ¶ mar~…ĺatad…ômaw, mapataj sa najnaji bar~…ĺisa, war~…ĺ…ôsaj sa tajni, war~…ĺ…ôsaj sa jadatu. , manapisapudańß tu udip, mana pisajadańß, kija Ňčar~…ĺiwŇčiw. . manapisukajnańß, manapisa…ôb…ôt tu udip, r~…ĺipańßak ku kapańßaj widasa mańßini dawmi ku maudipaj.*********. u ¶anan ku kakitaan ńßananaj, u ¶ana masasukajdińß masasuada. , mańßida u wa ¶ańß mar~…ĺawp…ôs, sanaji tu.*****,****. sadińß…ômaj ńßan tu d…ôd…ômiad********, kasa…ôtim tu dd…ômiad, sakapańß ńßan tu d…ômiad. . ńßidan u ńßajnikabar~…ĺaki ku ¶a ¶aj ad…ômiad, s…ôitan tu kisu. .maudip, amana` katadikud. **,*****.mukan mukan tu , manaka daŇčidi tu r~…ĺawaj majdińß majdińß tu mana katadikud. mar~…ĺar~…ĺijas ku mar~…ĺar~…ĺijas tu, mana par~…ĺur~…ĺa…ô ¶us. . ¶ir~…ĺ…ôminaj si ¶…ôdamaj maŇč…ôr~…ĺuaj ar~…ĺ…ôdańßaj, winikija tat…ôŇčaaj nu tad…ômaw. namajdińß tu, namauŇča…ôŇč tu adadatu muwaŇči ¶ tu mańßi ¶a tawa ńßan. mar~…ĺibu tu mabidaŇč tu mabusuk tu mar~…ĺiŇč…ôs tu pajawa pajdaŇč ńßan tu. pataj nu Ňč…ôr~…ĺu`, maŇč…ôr~…ĺu`, mar~…ĺar~…ĺum, mańßi ¶ajkija, masabuńßat ńßank u bar~…ĺu ¶u` pa ¶…ôbańßan maudip. . sa…ôk…ôŇč…ôn, misanamuńß, misa…ôtim, manamuńß, mańßini kija namaudip. maudip ku tad…ômaw "inajaj ku kapańßaj" anu mabidaŇč sa, dat…ôŇč…ô ku tur~…ĺuaj a kamu ar~…ĺańßi ¶an, majdińß misatabaki a muwaŇči ¶, ju adada ku bar~…ĺu ¶u`, ar~…ĺańßi ¶a ¶aaj katatuduŇč ku kawaw. ar~…ĺańßi ¶an , tat…ôŇča majińß muuŇčar~…ĺ a muwaŇči ¶, adada kijami ku bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° u kawaw atu kajdińßan ¶asj kadaduar~…ĺa. u masad…ôpaj a nikaudip nu mad…ôm…ô ¶ nu masumadaj a r~…ĺabunu r~…ĺuma`, misuŇčaj patańß…ôkar~…ĺ tu bar~…ĺu ¶u` pasajda tu ¶a ¶aj atad…ômaw adińßsakutaw u kasinir~…ĺ ku piadińß. .
